basics.name: Youngjae Cho
basics.label: ML Engineer
basics.summary: ML Engineer experienced in research, optimization, and production serving. M.S. from KAIST (ICML, AAAI).

highlights: An unified LLM benchmarking CLI (throughput, latency, pipeline stability)
Engineered pluggable engine abstraction (vLLM, HF, synthetic fallback for GPU-less CI)
First-author research on GAPO — geometry-aware preference alignment for LLMs (under review)
Built diffusion-based data synthesis pipeline for anomaly detection (F1: 0.30 → 0.67)
Enabled 2048x2048 training within 24GB via Flash Attention + DeepSpeed
Developed OCR pipeline with Triton serving, TensorRT optimization, and test-time augmentation

publications.name: GAPO: Geometric Anchoring for Robust Preference Alignment
Background-Aware Defect Generation for Industrial Anomaly Detection
Make Prompts Adaptable: Bayesian Modeling for VL Prompt Learning

portfolio.name: LLM Benchmarking CLI
portfolio.description: Unified benchmarking CLI with pluggable engine adapters and automated pass/fail reports.

portfolio.name: Industrial Data Synthesis Pipeline
portfolio.description: Diffusion-based synthesis with Flash Attention + DeepSpeed. F1: 0.30 → 0.67.

portfolio.name: OCR Serving Pipeline
portfolio.description: End-to-end OCR on Triton with TensorRT and test-time augmentation.
